Package glide.api.models.commands.stream

Class StreamAddOptionsBinary.StreamAddOptionsBinaryBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • glide.api.models.commands.stream.StreamAddOptionsBinary.StreamAddOptionsBinaryBuilder
  • Enclosing class:

extends java.lang.Object

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      StreamAddOptionsBinary build()  
      StreamAddOptionsBinary.StreamAddOptionsBinaryBuilder id​(GlideString id)
      If set, the new entry will be added with this id.
      StreamAddOptionsBinary.StreamAddOptionsBinaryBuilder makeStream​(java.lang.Boolean makeStream)
      If set to false, a new stream won't be created if no stream matches the given key.
      java.lang.String toString()  
      StreamAddOptionsBinary.StreamAddOptionsBinaryBuilder trim​(StreamTrimOptions trim)
      If set, the add operation will also trim the older entries in the stream.

    • Method Detail

      • id

        public StreamAddOptionsBinary.StreamAddOptionsBinaryBuilder id​(GlideString id)
        If set, the new entry will be added with this id.
        Returns:
        this.

      • makeStream

        public StreamAddOptionsBinary.StreamAddOptionsBinaryBuilder makeStream​(java.lang.Boolean makeStream)
        If set to false, a new stream won't be created if no stream matches the given key.
        Equivalent to NOMKSTREAM in the Valkey API.
        Returns:
        this.

      • trim

        public StreamAddOptionsBinary.StreamAddOptionsBinaryBuilder trim​(StreamTrimOptions trim)
        If set, the add operation will also trim the older entries in the stream.
        Returns:
        this.

      • build

        public StreamAddOptionsBinary build()

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Overrides:
